title: Assist with artificial insemination procedures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with artificial insemination procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist with preparation of animals for insemination

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor AI procedure to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor AI procedure to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor AI procedure to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Move animals on heat to insemination area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move animals on heat to insemination area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move animals on heat to insemination area.

pcs.text: Restrain animals using safe and humane techniques according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Restrain animals using safe and humane techniques according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Restrain animals using safe and humane techniques according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Prepare tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe materials, tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe materials, tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe materials, tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.title: Support insemination procedure

pcs.text: Sterilise and clean or dispose of insemination equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sterilise and clean or dispose of insemination equipment.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare recipient animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare recipient animal.

pcs.text: Restrain recipient animal according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Restrain recipient animal according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Restrain recipient animal according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Assist with insemination procedure as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with insemination procedure as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with insemination procedure as directed.

pcs.text: Record details of insemination, identification of the semen used and identities of the female animals according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of insemination, identification of the semen used and identities of the female animals according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of insemination, identification of the semen used and identities of the female animals according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Support insemination procedure
